prompt: A high-end editorial photograph for a magazine. A dark, empty concrete school hallway contains exactly eight school desks arranged in a perfect, symmetrical 2-by-4 rectangular grid (two rows of four). Seven desks are normal, warm polished wood. The eighth desk in the bottom right corner is painted bright hazard-sign yellow and is completely shattered into sharp, jagged pieces. A single cold overhead spotlight hits only the shattered yellow desk. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, no people, no text, no charts. TOTAL DESK COUNT MUST BE EXACTLY EIGHT.
dataset_name: CDC Youth Risk Behavior Survey (YRBS) Data Summary & Trends Report: 2013–2023
insight: By using a precise 2x4 grid of 8 desks where exactly one is painted hazard-yellow and shattered, I am visualizing the 13% of students (approx. 1-in-8) who missed school because they felt unsafe.
